title: Again Generate Detailed 25Ct Coin Inspired By
sourceTitle: Again Generate Detailed 25Ct Coin Inspired By

imagePrompts.prompt:
again to generate a detailed 25ct coin
inspired by the game universe.

Here’s the prompt I used 👇
Create a collectible Street Fighter-themed 25 cent coin shown from both sides, with detailed engravings, arcade-inspired design, and realistic metallic textures.
